description:
Re-run comprehensive competitor investigation and account strategy with HTML report.

Phase 1 (Scout): Run fresh data collection (python3 scripts/scout.py --raw --compact), then perform deep analysis covering: growth patterns, posting frequency/timing, content types, AI beauty characteristics, engagement tactics, hashtag effectiveness, profile/bio analysis. Write enriched scout report to data/scout_report_20260306.json.

Phase 2 (Strategist): Using Scout's deep analysis, build detailed from-scratch account strategies for both EN and JP. Cover: persona definition, content pillars and style, posting schedule and frequency, image generation direction, engagement playbook, follower growth tactics, hashtag strategy, profile optimization recommendations. Write to data/strategy_20260306.json.

Phase 3 (Report): Compile all findings and strategies into a detailed, polished HTML report at data/strategy_report_20260306.html. Include: competitor landscape overview, key findings, detailed EN strategy, detailed JP strategy, action items. Make it visually clean and easy to scan.

Every recommendation must be backed by competitor data. Output files MUST exist when done.
notes: This is a re-run — previous execution completed with exit code 0 but produced no output files. Ensure all 3 deliverables are written: scout_report_20260306.json, strategy_20260306.json, strategy_report_20260306.html. Latest existing data is from 20260305. Operator wants SPECIFIC, DETAILED strategies backed by real competitor data — not generic advice.
